_archetype: Multi-sleeve ALLOCATOR BLEND (inverse-vol 63d risk-parity of a TQQQ vol-target sleeve + a sector-rotation top-2 sleeve). The bench's first multi-sleeve allocator wired to live PAPER trading.
_validated: reports/ALLOCATOR_BLEND_20260621.md — full Sharpe 1.014 / OOS 1.147 / maxDD -23.9%, beats BOTH sleeves standalone. Promoted config: invvol_63d.
_thesis: Trade the validated blend's CURRENT per-underlying target weights faithfully on a paper clock, using the new partial-trim primitive in runner_xsec.py so legs can be reduced-while-long instead of only bought/closed. Weights are REUSED verbatim from runner.allocator_paper_tracker.compute_blend_state() (the validated decomposition) — zero sleeve-math reimplementation, lookahead-safe by construction.
_paper_only: PAPER ONLY. No real money. Scheduled in crontab + cron_tick.sh as of 2026-06-22 (reviewed/greenlit by main). Seed fills 2026-06-22 16:09 UTC; first cron-driven tick expected next trading day 07-13 UTC window.
_churn_frac_note: Rebalance a leg only if |target_qty - cur_qty| > max(1, floor(churn_frac*target_qty)). Mirrors tqqq_cot_combo's 5% churn guard so intramonth weight drift doesn't thrash the book.
_monthly_cadence_note: The validated blend rebalances at month-open; by default we only re-target on a month change (intramonth ticks HOLD). Set false to re-target every tick (still churn-guarded) for faster paper convergence.
_regime_gate_note: This allocator has its own internal risk management via the vol-target sleeve + inv-vol weighting; it does NOT consume the runner's Tier-2 regime gate. Left false.
_safety_note: safety_max_loss_pct is the HARD runaway rail enforced by runner/safety_backstop.py, not entry/exit logic.
_bear_flatten_gate_note: L165 SECONDARY: runner-level SPY-200d-SMA bear-flatten overlay (201d re-entry hysteresis). On a SPY bear-latch the xsec runner closes every held leg and skips decide_xsec until SPY reclaims SMA201. Stacks with the internal vol-target/inv-vol risk mgmt. PAPER. See reports/REGIME_DETECTION_L165_*.md.
